data.title: Senators are questioning if Trump will attend a memecoin event in Florida amidst a potential schedule conflict.
data.description: A group of senators is expressing concern over a possible scheduling conflict involving the president's attendance at a luncheon in Florida for memecoin holders. They are seeking clarification on whether the president's participation is to support the memecoin community or merely for financial gain through fees.

data.title: Pyth Network's marketplace disrupts data industry by enabling institutions to share pricing feeds onchain using pay-as-you-go model.
data.description: Organizations now have the option to upload pricing information onto the blockchain using a pay-per-use structure, providing a new approach compared to conventional data dissemination platforms. This system allows companies to share pricing feeds cost-effectively and efficiently.

data.title: Availability of the preparatory information for the Combined Shareholders' Meeting of May 21st, 2026
data.description: Preparatory information for the Combined Shareholders' Meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026, is now accessible. Shareholders can review crucial details and documents ahead of the meeting date. This includes financial reports, agenda items, and voting procedures. It is important for shareholders to familiarize themselves with this information as the meeting approaches. Make sure to check for updates and announcements regarding the meeting to stay informed.

data.title: North America Leads Vanilla Bean Market with 37.8% Share as Global Industry Set to Reach USD 2.3 Billion by 2031, Says Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of April 10, 2026, a research report by Mordor Intelligence indicates that the market size of vanilla beans is expected to increase from USD 1.7 billion in 2026 to USD 2.3 billion by 2031. The market was valued at USD 1.6 billion in 2025 and is estimated to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.23% during this period.

data.title: HOTEL & SHOP PLUS: Redefining the Future of Hospitality and Commercial Spaces
data.description: In Shanghai, the HOTEL & SHOP PLUS event organized by IM Sinoexpo wrapped up successfully at the Shanghai New International Expo Center running from March 31 to April 3, 2026. Going beyond a typical trade show, this premier platform provided insights and innovations for the industry.

data.title: Oil prices increase as stocks go up before U.S. inflation report. Truce with Iran in doubt, eyes on inflation data.
data.description: Investors are closely monitoring the release of U.S. government data on inflation as a temporary halt in the Iran war encounters several obstacles. The temporary cease-fire in the conflict with Iran is facing challenges, with significant attention on the inflation figures from the U.S. authorities.
